evals.prompt: 帮我创建一个关于2024年团队年度回顾的演示文稿，大约8张幻灯片。内容包括：封面、年度目标回顾（3个核心OKR达成情况）、重点项目成果（4个项目的简要总结）、团队成长（招聘了5位新成员、举办了12场技术分享）、明年展望（3个战略方向）、结尾感谢页。使用温暖的配色方案。
evals.expected_output: 一个完整的 reveal.js HTML 演示文稿，包含8张幻灯片，使用温暖色调（如 Warm Blush 或 Terracotta），每张幻灯片有不同布局（stat boxes、card grid、timeline 等），通过 overflow 检查无布局问题。

assertions.name: HTML file exists and is valid
assertions.check: The output HTML file exists, contains <!doctype html>, <div class="reveal">, and Reveal.initialize

assertions.name: Correct slide count
assertions.check: HTML contains at least 8 <section> elements (may include vertical stack wrappers)

assertions.name: CSS variables customized
assertions.check: The styles.css file has non-default values for --primary-color and --background-color (not #2196F3 and #ffffff)

assertions.name: Diverse layouts used
assertions.check: HTML uses at least 3 different layout patterns: grid (grid-template-columns), flex, and stat boxes or card containers

assertions.name: Section divider for title slide
assertions.check: First section has class="section-divider"

assertions.name: All slides have unique IDs
assertions.check: Each <section> has a unique id attribute, no duplicates

assertions.name: Uses pt for font sizes
assertions.check: Inline styles and CSS use pt units for font-size, not px/em/rem (except the reveal.js base)

assertions.name: No overflow issues
assertions.check: Running check-overflow.js reports no overflow, or Puppeteer is not installed (graceful skip)

assertions.name: Scaffold script was used
assertions.check: The HTML structure matches scaffold output pattern (contains section-divider class, content divs, RevealChart plugin)

assertions.name: Warm color palette
assertions.check: CSS uses warm tones — primary or secondary color contains warm hues (reds, oranges, yellows, pinks, or earth tones), not blue/green defaults

evals.prompt: Create a technical architecture presentation for a microservices system. It should cover: system overview with a diagram showing 6 services, API gateway pattern, data flow with a sequence diagram, performance metrics shown as bar charts comparing Q1-Q4, and a tech stack overview. Use a dark theme. About 10 slides.
evals.expected_output: 一个深色主题的 reveal.js 演示文稿，约10张幻灯片，包含 Mermaid 图表（架构图和时序图）、Chart.js 柱状图、代码高亮（可能展示 API 配置），使用 Dark Neon 或 Midnight 配色，图表通过 check-charts.js 验证无问题。

assertions.name: HTML file exists and is valid
assertions.check: The output HTML file exists, contains <!doctype html>, <div class="reveal">, and Reveal.initialize

assertions.name: Dark theme applied
assertions.check: CSS has dark background (--background-color is a dark color like #1a1a2e, #0d1117, or similar) and light text (--text-color is light like #f0f0f0)

assertions.name: Contains charts
assertions.check: HTML contains at least one <canvas data-chart="bar"> element with valid JSON configuration in an HTML comment

assertions.name: Charts pass validation
assertions.check: Running check-charts.js reports no errors

assertions.name: Mermaid plugin loaded
assertions.check: HTML includes the RevealMermaid plugin script and contains at least one <div class="mermaid"> element

assertions.name: Correct slide count
assertions.check: HTML contains approximately 10 slide sections (8-12 range acceptable)

assertions.name: Chart maintainAspectRatio false
assertions.check: All chart configurations include maintainAspectRatio: false in options

assertions.name: Chart uses flexbox layout
assertions.check: Chart sections use the required flexbox pattern: section with display:flex and container with flex:1 and position:relative

assertions.name: RevealMermaid registered
assertions.check: RevealMermaid is included in the plugins array of Reveal.initialize

assertions.name: Chart colors readable on dark background
assertions.check: Chart defaults in Reveal.initialize use light colors (not default black/dark)

evals.prompt: I have an existing presentation at /tmp/product-launch.html. It's a reveal.js deck with 5 slides about our new product. Can you add 2 more slides: one with a pricing comparison table (Free vs Pro vs Enterprise tiers) and one with customer testimonials (3 quotes)? Keep the existing styling consistent.
evals.expected_output: 正确地在现有 HTML 文件中追加2张新幻灯片，使用 Edit 工具而非重写整个文件。定价对比表使用合适的 grid 或 table 布局，客户评价使用 quote/card 布局，新幻灯片沿用现有 CSS 变量和配色方案。

assertions.name: Edit tool used not Write
assertions.check: The skill uses Edit tool to insert new slides into the existing file, not Write tool to rewrite the entire file

assertions.name: Pricing comparison layout
assertions.check: New slide contains a 3-column grid layout (grid-template-columns: repeat(3)) with tier names (Free, Pro, Enterprise)

assertions.name: Testimonials layout
assertions.check: New slide contains at least 3 quote or testimonial elements (blockquote, testimonial cards, or similar)

assertions.name: Existing styles preserved
assertions.check: No changes to existing CSS variables, section IDs, or previously existing slides — only additions

assertions.name: New slides inserted before closing tags
assertions.check:
New
elements are added before (end of .slides container), not outside the slides structure

assertions.name: Consistent CSS variable usage
assertions.check: New slide content uses var(--primary-color), var(--secondary-color), etc. instead of hardcoded colors

assertions.name: Existing slide count preserved
assertions.check: Original 5 slides remain intact with their original content unchanged
